question: Which of the following is true of a CAAS Class 2 Activity Permit?

options.text: Required for recreational UA user flying outdoors above 200ft AMSL.
Granted to an organization/individual to assess safe operations of the Unmanned Aircraft (UA) safely.
Required for educational UA user flying indoors.
For UA activities conducted outdoors for purposes that are not recreational or educational in nature.

classification_notes: Class 2 permit conditions are being tested.
